name: com.cyclone-games.device-feedback
description: Multi-platform device feedback (haptics, vibration, lighting) for Unity. Supports Android/iOS/WebGL mobile vibration, gamepad rumble, and light bar control with DI and static facade patterns.

samples.description: Demo scene showing all mobile haptic API features: presets, custom patterns, iOS-specific haptics, AnimationCurve vibration, and toggle control.
